title: Delhi World Championships: Attracting New Generations to Badminton
indian_angle: India is hosting the BWF World Championships in Delhi, making this a significant event for Indian badminton and its future fan base.
summary: A discussion on the importance of engaging younger audiences like Gen Z and Gen Alpha to ensure the continued growth and popularity of badminton, especially with the upcoming World Championships in Delhi.

title: BAI Releases Eligibility Criteria for World Junior Championships 2026
indian_angle: This circular directly impacts aspiring Indian junior shuttlers hoping to represent the nation at a prestigious international event.
summary: Badminton Association of India (BAI) has issued a circular detailing the eligibility criteria for Indian players aiming to participate in the BWF World Junior Championships 2026 in Cairo, Egypt.

title: BAI President Comments on Animal Incidents at India Open
indian_angle: The statement comes from the President of the Badminton Association of India regarding an incident at a major Indian tournament.
summary: BAI President Himanta Biswa Sarma addressed recent incidents involving animals during the India Open, humorously questioning the issue if "monkeys come to watch a game."

title: New 3x15 Scoring System to Debut in Indian Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This is a significant rule change impacting all junior domestic ranking tournaments and national championships across India.
summary: The Badminton Association of India (BAI) is implementing a new 3x15 scoring system for all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships in the U-13, U-15, and U-17 age groups, set to debut at Ernakulam.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: An Indian top player reached the final of a Super 300 event, a notable achievement for Indian badminton.
summary: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth's impressive run at the US Open came to an end in the final, where he was defeated by Su Li Yang.

title: Indian Shuttler Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No. 6 at US Open
indian_angle: A young Indian player achieved a significant upset victory against a top-ranked opponent on the international stage.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan created a stir at the US Open Super 300 by defeating World No 6 Chou Tien Chen.
